notes:
v2.2.0 Update
✨ Added a GM System Toast sender with default, info, success, warning, and error toast styles. GMs can send to all active users or to selected users from GM Settings, or via a GM-only shortcut in Control Center.
✨ Added Simple Calendar Reborn as a Time Settings source. The original Simple Calendar integration is still available.
✨ GMs can now edit phone numbers regardless of the player custom-number setting.
✨ Added a public Banking API. Other GlitchSmith modules can read and update a character's primary bank balance, and history entries are recorded on each transaction. Stylish Shop v1.3.2 already uses this for its new Smartphone Banking payment route.
🐛 The Calendar app no longer opens itself when Simple Calendar advances time while another phone app is active.
🐛 Smartphone Widget action button styles no longer affect chat cards from other systems or modules.
🗑️ Update and announcement popups now come from GlitchSmith Library instead of the module's own notifier.

announcement.title: 📱 Smartphone Widget v2.2.0
announcement.content:
Smartphone Widget v2.2.0 is ready.

  • System Toasts: GMs can send styled toast notifications to all active users or selected users.
  • Simple Calendar Reborn: Now available as a Time Settings source alongside the original Simple Calendar integration.
  • Phone Number Editing: GMs can edit phone numbers regardless of the player custom-number setting.
  • Public Banking API: Other GlitchSmith modules can read and update a character's primary bank balance. Stylish Shop v1.3.2 already uses this for its new Smartphone Banking payment option.
